    defaultsEd25519() - Static method in record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 — explicit ED25519, no auto-detection.

    Reads the authorized_keys file from the remote host.

    remoteArch(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the remote machine's CPU architecture (x86_64, aarch64, etc.).
    remoteArch(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Returns the remote machine's CPU architecture.
    remoteCommandExists(SshHost, String) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    True if a given command/binary exists on the remote machine.
    remoteCommandExists(SshHost, String) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    True if a given command exists on the remote machine.
    remoteDiskUsage(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns a disk usage summary of the remote machine.
    remoteHostname(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the remote machine's hostname.
    remoteHostname(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Returns the remote machine's hostname.
    remoteKernelVersion(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the remote kernel version string.
    remoteKernelVersion(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Returns the remote kernel version string.
    remoteMachineId(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the remote machine's /etc/machine-id.
    remoteMemoryUsage(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns a memory usage summary of the remote machine.
    remoteOsFamily(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the remote machine's OS family (Linux, Darwin, etc.).
    remoteOsFamily(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Returns the remote machine's OS family (Linux, Darwin, etc.).
    remoteOsPrettyName(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the OS pretty name from /etc/os-release.
    remotePathExists(SshHost, String) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    True if a given path (file or directory) exists on the remote machine.
    remotePathExists(SshHost, String) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    True if a given path exists on the remote machine.
    remoteUptime(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the uptime of the remote machine in human-readable form.
    remoteWhoami(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI
    Returns the current logged-in user on the remote machine.
    remoteWhoami(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Returns the current logged-in user on the remote machine.
    removeKey(SshHost, SshPublicKey) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host.SshHostAPI
    Removes a public key from the remote host's authorized_keys.
    removeKey(SshHost, SshPublicKey) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.SshAPI
    Removes a public key from the remote host's authorized_keys.
    replaceAllKeys(SshHost, SshPublicKey) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host.SshHostAPI
    Removes all keys and replaces with only the given key (emergency lockout recovery).
    revokeAllKeys(SshHost) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host.SshHostAPI
    Removes all authorized keys — locks out all key-based access.
    revokeByComment(SshHost, String) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host.SshHostAPI
    Removes all keys matching the given comment.
    rotateKey(SshHost, SshPublicKey, SshPublicKey) - Method in interface io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host.SshHostAPI
    Atomically replaces an old key with a new one (key rotation).

    sshAPI() - Method in class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.SshConfiguration
     
    SshAPI - Interface in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api
    Public SSH API — unified facade over client operations (remote command execution, file transfer) and host management (authorized_keys).
    SshAPI.SshCommandResult - Record Class in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api
    Result of a remotely executed SSH command.
    SshClientAPI - Interface in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client
    Service for executing commands and transferring files on a remote SSH host.
    SshClientAPI.SshCommandResult - Record Class in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client
    Result of a remotely executed SSH command.
    SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig - Record Class in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client
    Infrastructure-layer configuration for establishing an SSH connection.
    SshCommandResult(String, int, String, String, Duration) - Constructor for record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshCommandResult
    Creates an instance of a SshCommandResult record class.

    Creates an instance of a SshCommandResult record class.

    Creates an instance of a SshConnectionConfig record class.
    SshHostAPI - Interface in io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.host
    Service for managing SSH access on a remote host — reading and writing authorized_keys, checking key presence, etc.

    withKey(String) - Static method in record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig

    withKey(String, String) - Static method in record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    Specific key file with passphrase.
    withPassword(String) - Static method in record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig

    withStrictHostChecking() - Method in record class io.joshuasalcedo.os.application.api.ssh.client.SshClientAPI.SshConnectionConfig
    Returns a copy with strict host key checking enabled.

    Writes the given authorized_keys to the remote host, replacing the existing file.

    Writes the given authorized_keys to the remote host.
